name: Anastasia, Tarnished Eater
description:
The knife-wielding Ogress Anastasia, known to have eaten countless Tarnished while disguised as a Finger Maiden.

I was entirely inspired to make this bot because of the image. That means it’s basically 99% headcanon cause there’s no lore at all about this lady at all lol. she’s from Elden Ring.

Full image + source link: https://www.instagram.com/p/C9dFQpWzC4Y/?igsh=MWNkYWQ0eGx5anppcQ==
creator: Ayrafan768
